title: Microlecane carinata
taxonomy: Microlecane carinata is a genus of wasps in the family Trichogrammatidae. The species Microlecane carinata is classified within the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, order Hymenoptera, and family Trichogrammatidae. It belongs to the subfamily Trichogrammatinae, which is a group of small wasps that are parasitic and primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Microlecane carinata is a parasitic wasp that lays its eggs inside the eggs of other insects, and the larvae feed on the developing embryos. As a member of the family Trichogrammatidae, Microlecane carinata plays an essential role in controlling insect populations and is often used as a biological control agent.
